title: AWS AI Pitch Competition
description: Early and growth stage AI founders pitch to experts from AWS, nClouds, AllCode, and CA Capital Women's Business Center. Winner receives up to $25k in AWS Partner Funding. Open to spectators too.

title: Sacramento AI Collective — Inaugural Meetup
description: The first meeting of the Sacramento AI Collective.

title: Designing Purpose-Driven AI Ecosystems for Multicultural Youth
description: Workshop exploring how AI can expand opportunity and belonging for multicultural youth. Led by Jeurys Santiago, founder of Minds With Purpose. Ideal for educators, community leaders, and anyone interested in purpose-driven AI.

name: Sacramento AI & Tech Meetup 2026
description: A community meetup focused on AI, machine learning, and emerging technologies with talks and networking opportunities.
